name: Hoax.ai Internal Engine Fixtures
fixture_policy: Fictional, neutral, non-identifiable examples only. No real people, institutions, brands, political events, or accusations. Fixtures test schema alignment and boundary language only.

fixtures.input_summary: A fictional screenshot artifact with visible content but no complete source chain or publication path in available notes.
fixtures.required_boundary_statement: Posture applies to the fictional screenshot artifact only, not to any depicted or referenced subject.
fixtures.notes: Tests provenance-limited pathway with incomplete source chain. Fictional example only.

fixtures.input_summary: A fictional audio recording artifact with coherence notes present but context notes incomplete and disputed in available scope.
fixtures.required_boundary_statement: Posture applies to the fictional audio artifact only, not to any voice or subject referenced in the recording.
fixtures.notes: Tests contextual instability with partial coherence signals. Fictional example only.

fixtures.input_summary: A fictional document artifact with one supporting source record reference but unresolved provenance and corroboration gaps.
fixtures.required_boundary_statement: Posture applies to the fictional document artifact only, not to any institution or person mentioned in the document.
fixtures.notes: Tests partially supported posture with provenance limitations. Fictional example only.

fixtures.input_summary: A fictional media object with minimal artifact description and no source, context, or coherence notes sufficient for stronger posture language.
fixtures.required_boundary_statement: Not assessable is not suspicious by itself. Posture applies to the artifact only.
fixtures.notes: Tests conservative resolution to not_assessable_posture. Fictional example only.

fixtures.input_summary: A fictional description of a planned evidence-posture capability layer that is not currently active or operational.
fixtures.required_boundary_statement: Planned is not live. Mention is not capability. No public tool is implied.
fixtures.notes: Tests planned_not_claimed_posture for future capability framing. Fictional example only.
